Accordion.name: items
Accordion.description: An array of accordion items to be rendered.

Accordion.name: defaultActiveKey
Accordion.description: The key(s) of the initially active panel(s).

Accordion.name: activeKey
Accordion.description: The key(s) of the currently active panel(s). If provided, the component is controlled.

Accordion.name: onChange
Accordion.description: Callback executed when the active panel(s) change.

Accordion.name: allowMultiple
Accordion.description: If `true`, multiple panels can be open at once.

Accordion.name: bordered
Accordion.description: If `false`, the borders between items will be hidden.

Accordion.name: variant
Accordion.description:
The visual variant of the accordion.
- 'default': Standard bordered accordion
- 'glass': Glass morphism style with backdrop blur
- 'minimal': Minimal borderless style

Accordion.name: fullWidthMobile
Accordion.description: If `true`, the accordion takes full width on mobile devices.

Accordion.name: stagger
Accordion.description: If `true`, enables staggered entrance animations for items.

Accordion.name: staggerDelay
Accordion.description: The delay between staggered animations in seconds.

Accordion.name: className
Accordion.description: The custom class name for the wrapper

Accordion.name: style
Accordion.description: Optional inline styles for the wrapper

Alert.name: message
Alert.description: The main title or message of the alert.

Alert.name: description
Alert.description: Optional longer description text below the message.

Alert.name: type
Alert.description: Defines the visual style and icon of the alert.

Alert.name: closable
Alert.description: If `true`, a close icon will be displayed to dismiss the alert.

Alert.name: onClose
Alert.description: Callback function executed when the close icon is clicked.

Alert.name: showIcon
Alert.description: If `true`, an icon corresponding to the type will be shown.

AppBar.name: title
AppBar.description: The title text to display in the app bar.

AppBar.name: actions
AppBar.description: Content to display on the right side of the app bar (actions).

AppBar.name: onMenuClick
AppBar.description:
Callback fired when the menu button is clicked.
If provided, a hamburger menu button will be shown.

AppBar.name: elevated
AppBar.description: Whether to show a bottom border/shadow.

Button.name: fullWidth
Button.type: boolean | { sm: boolean; md: boolean; lg: boolean; } | undefined

Button.name: aria-label
Button.description: Defines a string value that labels the current element.

Card.name: bordered
Card.description: Adds a subtle border for better contrast.

Card.name: hoverable
Card.description: Adds hover and active effects. Useful when the whole card is clickable.

Card.name: loading
Card.description: If `true`, a loading spinner will be displayed over the card content.

Card.name: shimmer
Card.description: If `true`, shows a shimmer loading effect instead of spinner.

Card.name: cover
Card.description: Content to render at the top of the card, often an image.

Card.name: coverAspectRatio
Card.description: Aspect ratio for the cover image container.

Card.name: header
Card.description: Content to render in the header section, above the main children.

Card.name: footer
Card.description: Content to render in the footer section, below the main children.

Carousel.name: items
Carousel.description: Array of slide items or React nodes

Carousel.name: children
Carousel.description: Legacy: React node children (deprecated, use items instead)

Collapsible.name: trigger
Collapsible.description:
The trigger element or text for the collapsible.
Can be a string, React node, or a custom element.

Collapsible.name: defaultOpen
Collapsible.description: Whether the collapsible is open by default (uncontrolled mode).

Collapsible.name: open
Collapsible.description: Controlled open state. When provided, the component becomes controlled.

Collapsible.name: onOpenChange
Collapsible.description: Callback fired when the open state changes.

Collapsible.name: unmountOnExit
Collapsible.description: If `true`, the content will be unmounted when collapsed.

Collapsible.name: disabled
Collapsible.description: If `true`, the trigger will be disabled.

Collapsible.name: className
Collapsible.description: Optional custom class name for the wrapper.

Collapsible.name: icon
Collapsible.description: Custom icon to replace the default chevron.

CopyButton.name: text
CopyButton.description:
The text to copy to clipboard. If not provided, will attempt to copy
from the target element or current selection.

CopyButton.name: targetRef
CopyButton.description: The target element to copy text from (useful for auto-detect).

CopyButton.name: tooltipLabel
CopyButton.description: Tooltip text shown when hovering over the button before copying.

CopyButton.name: successTooltipLabel
CopyButton.description: Tooltip text shown after successful copy.

CopyButton.name: successDuration
CopyButton.description: Duration in milliseconds to show the success state.

CopyButton.name: copyIcon
CopyButton.description: Custom icon to show before copying.

CopyButton.name: successIcon
CopyButton.description: Custom icon to show after successful copy.

Form.name: form
Form.description: Form instance (optional - will be created if not provided)

Form.name: onFinishFailed
Form.type: ((errors: { values: unknown; errorFields: { name: string; errors: string[]; }[]; }) => void) | undefined
Form.description: Callback when form submit fails validation

Form.name: onValuesChange
Form.description: Callback when any field value changes

Form.name: onFieldsChange
Form.description: Callback when any field errors change

Form.name: labelCol
Form.type: { span?: number | undefined; offset?: number | undefined; } | undefined
Form.description: Label col span for horizontal layout

Form.name: wrapperCol
Form.type: { span?: number | undefined; offset?: number | undefined; } | undefined

Form.name: colon
Form.description: Whether to show colon after label

Form.name: scrollToFirstError
Form.type: boolean | { behavior?: ScrollBehavior | undefined; block?: ScrollLogicalPosition | undefined; inline?: ScrollLogicalPosition | undefined; } | undefined
Form.description: Scroll to first error on submit

Form.name: requiredMark
Form.description: Required field mark - can be 'optional' to show optional label

Form.name: responsiveBreakpoint
Form.description: v1.2.0: Responsive breakpoint for layout changes

Form.name: zodSchema
Form.description: Optional Zod schema for form validation

InternalForm.name: form
InternalForm.description: Form instance (optional - will be created if not provided)

InternalForm.name: onFinishFailed
InternalForm.type: ((errors: { values: unknown; errorFields: { name: string; errors: string[]; }[]; }) => void) | undefined
InternalForm.description: Callback when form submit fails validation

InternalForm.name: onValuesChange
InternalForm.description: Callback when any field value changes

InternalForm.name: onFieldsChange
InternalForm.description: Callback when any field errors change

InternalForm.name: labelCol
InternalForm.type: { span?: number | undefined; offset?: number | undefined; } | undefined
InternalForm.description: Label col span for horizontal layout

InternalForm.name: wrapperCol
InternalForm.type: { span?: number | undefined; offset?: number | undefined; } | undefined

InternalForm.name: colon
InternalForm.description: Whether to show colon after label

InternalForm.name: scrollToFirstError
InternalForm.type: boolean | { behavior?: ScrollBehavior | undefined; block?: ScrollLogicalPosition | undefined; inline?: ScrollLogicalPosition | undefined; } | undefined
InternalForm.description: Scroll to first error on submit

InternalForm.name: requiredMark
InternalForm.description: Required field mark - can be 'optional' to show optional label

InternalForm.name: responsiveBreakpoint
InternalForm.description: v1.2.0: Responsive breakpoint for layout changes

InternalForm.name: zodSchema
InternalForm.description: Optional Zod schema for form validation

Icon.name: icon
Icon.description: A react-icons component to render directly

Icon.name: name
Icon.description: Predefined icon name from the built-in map

Icon.name: color
Icon.description: Explicit icon color. Falls back to theme text color when omitted.

Icon.name: className
Icon.description: Additional className for the outer container

Input.name: fullWidth
Input.type: boolean | { sm: boolean; md: boolean; lg: boolean; } | undefined

Menu.name: renderItem
Menu.type: ((item: MenuItemDef, props: { onClick: () => void; onMouseEnter: () => void; isActive: boolean; isDisabled: boolean; }) => ReactNode) | undefined

Modal.name: position
Modal.description: Toggles the vertical alignment of the modal.

Modal.name: fullScreen
Modal.description: If `true`, the modal will take up the entire viewport.

Modal.name: lockScroll
Modal.description: If `false`, the body scroll will not be locked when the modal is open.

Modal.name: mobileVariant
Modal.description: Mobile variant: 'modal' (default) or 'bottom-sheet' (slides up from bottom)

Modal.name: maximizable
Modal.description: If `true`, the modal supports maximized/minimized state (for complex modals)

Pagination.name: onChange
Pagination.description: Callback fired when a page is selected.

Pagination.name: siblingCount
Pagination.description: Number of sibling pages to show on each side of current page.

Popover.name: trigger
Popover.description: The element that triggers the popover

Popover.name: placement
Popover.description: Position relative to trigger: top, bottom, left, right, center

Popover.name: portal
Popover.description: If true, renders popover in a portal (body)

Popover.name: aria-describedby
Popover.description: ID of element describing the popover

Popover.name: withArrow
Popover.description: If true, shows the arrow pointer

ProgressBar.name: variant
ProgressBar.description: Sets the visual style of the progress bar.

ProgressBar.name: status
ProgressBar.description: Sets the color of the bar based on status.

ProgressBar.name: indeterminate
ProgressBar.description: For when progress is unknown. Overrides `value`.

Rating.name: value
Rating.description:
Current rating value.
Supports integers and half values (e.g., 3.5).

Rating.name: precision
Rating.description: Rating precision (allows 0.5 for half stars, or 1 for whole stars).

Rating.name: onChange
Rating.description: Callback fired when the rating changes.

Resizable.name: defaultSize
Resizable.description:
Default size of the first panel (in pixels or percentage).
Can be number (px) or string (e.g., '50%', '300px').

Resizable.name: minSize
Resizable.description: Minimum size of the first panel in pixels.

Resizable.name: maxSize
Resizable.description: Maximum size of the first panel in pixels.

Resizable.name: children
Resizable.description: Children to render in the panels (should be exactly 2 elements).

Result.name: status
Result.description: The status of the result which determines the icon and color.

Result.name: extra
Result.description: Extra content to display below the subtitle (typically actions).

Result.name: icon
Result.description: Custom icon to override the default one based on status.

Skeleton.name: loading
Skeleton.description: If `true`, the skeleton placeholder will be shown. If `false`, the children will be rendered.

Skeleton.name: children
Skeleton.description: The content to render once loading is complete.

Skeleton.name: variant
Skeleton.description: The shape of the skeleton placeholder.

Skeleton.name: width
Skeleton.description: The width of the placeholder. Accepts any valid CSS value.

Skeleton.name: height
Skeleton.description: The height of the placeholder. Accepts any valid CSS value.

SkipToContent.name: targetId
SkipToContent.description: The id of the main content container to skip to.

SkipToContent.name: label
SkipToContent.description: The visible text of the skip link.

Statistic.name: prefix
Statistic.description: Content to display before the value (e.g., '$').

Statistic.name: suffix
Statistic.description: Content to display after the value (e.g., '%').

Statistic.name: trend
Statistic.description:
Trend direction ('up' | 'down' | null).
Shows an arrow indicator when set.

Statistic.name: animate
Statistic.description: Whether to animate the value entering.

Stepper.name: springConfig
Stepper.type: { stiffness?: number | undefined; damping?: number | undefined; mass?: number | undefined; } | undefined

Steps.name: direction
Steps.description: Direction of the steps: horizontal or vertical

Steps.name: onChange
Steps.description: Callback when a step is clicked (enables navigation)

Switch.name: checked
Switch.description: Toggles the on/off state of the switch.

Switch.name: onChange
Switch.description: Callback function to handle the state change.

Switch.name: size
Switch.description: How large should the switch be?

Switch.name: disabled
Switch.description: If `true`, the switch will be non-interactive.

Switch.name: label
Switch.description: Optional text label for the switch.

Switch.name: labelPosition
Switch.description: Position of the label relative to the switch.

Switch.name: loading
Switch.description: If `true`, a spinner is shown and the switch is disabled.

Switch.name: onIcon
Switch.description: Icon to display inside the knob when the switch is ON.

Switch.name: offIcon
Switch.description: Icon to display inside the knob when the switch is OFF.

Table.name: dataSource
Table.description: The data to be displayed in the table

Table.name: loading
Table.description: Set to `true` to show a loading spinner over the table

Table.name: skeletonRows
Table.description: Number of skeleton rows to show

Table.name: pagination
Table.type: false | { pageSize?: number | undefined; defaultCurrent?: number | undefined; } | undefined
Table.description: Configuration for pagination. Set to `false` to disable

Table.name: emptyDescription
Table.defaultValue: There are no records to display at this time.

Tabs.name: activeKey
Tabs.description: The key of the currently active tab. If provided, the component will be controlled.

Tabs.name: onTabChange
Tabs.description: Callback executed when the active tab changes.

Tabs.name: type
Tabs.description: The visual style of the tabs.

Tabs.name: tabPosition
Tabs.description: The position of the tabs relative to the content.

Tabs.name: centered
Tabs.description: Whether to center the tab buttons.

Tabs.name: tabBarExtraContent
Tabs.description: Extra content to render in the tab bar.

Tabs.name: className
Tabs.description: CSS class name for the tabs wrapper.

Tabs.name: style
Tabs.description: Inline styles for the tabs wrapper.

Tabs.name: overflow
Tabs.description:
How to handle tab overflow.
- 'auto': Show scrollbar when needed
- 'scroll': Always show scrollbar
- 'wrap': Wrap tabs to next line

Tabs.name: collapsible
Tabs.description: Whether to collapse overflow tabs into a "More" menu on small screens.

Tag.name: variant
Tag.description: The visual style of the tag.

Tag.name: leftIcon
Tag.description: Icon to display before the tag's text.

Tag.name: onClose
Tag.description: Callback function for when the close icon is clicked. Renders a close icon if provided.

Tag.name: color
Tag.description: Overrides the default component color. Accepts any valid CSS color.

TimePicker.name: value
TimePicker.description: Time value as string "14:30" or TimeValue object { hours: 14, minutes: 30 }

TimePicker.name: placeholder
TimePicker.description: Placeholder text when no value selected

TimePicker.name: allowClear
TimePicker.description: Clear button shown when value exists

Tooltip.name: content
Tooltip.description: The content to display inside the tooltip. Can be a string or any React node.

Tooltip.name: isOpen
Tooltip.description: Manually controls the visibility of the tooltip.

Tooltip.name: mouseEnterDelay
Tooltip.description: Delay in milliseconds before showing the tooltip on hover.

Tooltip.name: mouseLeaveDelay
Tooltip.description: Delay in milliseconds before hiding the tooltip on hover.

Tooltip.name: withArrow
Tooltip.description: If `false`, the pointer arrow will be hidden.
